title: Zooba: Zoo Battle Royale Games
notes:
• New, cleaner Daily Rewards screen.
• Fixed character bundle offers not showing for non-owners.
• Fixed victory ceremonies not showing icons or models.
• Fixed the Primal Instinct indicator appearing blocked for teammates.
• Fixed the Weapon Points reminder opening the wrong screen.
• Fixed a tutorial Daily Mission tab issue.
• Fixed the Trophy Challenge completion pop-up.
• Performance and stability improvements.
title_kr: Zooba: 모바일 동물원 배틀 로얄 온라인 게임

title: DRAGON BALL LEGENDS
notes:
A major update for the 8th anniversary!
・Mission Plan overhaul!
All Mission Plans up to now have been combined, and a new Premium Plan is here! Complete Missions to get Chrono Crystals and various other rewards!
・Also adjusted various UI elements
